$comment: Machine-readable index of skills installable from this marketplace. Consumed by the Nekko Dojo website (https://nekkolabs.com/dojo/skills). Curated external skills are catalogued on the website itself (link-only), not here. Keep entries in sync with .claude-plugin/marketplace.json.
